name: flashtrader
description: Executes opportunistic trades on Uniswap v2 / v3 pools when the on-chain price moves outside the configured band. Designed for low-latency arbitrage between correlated pairs.
author: flashtrader-defi

pair.description: The pool address to trade against

band.description: Price band in basis points before triggering a trade

txHash.description: Transaction hash of the executed swap
